description_long: This object consists of two sausages, one with a reddish-brown casing and the other with a lighter, beige casing, both placed side by side. The lighter sausage has a blue and white label wrapped around its middle, suggesting it is a packaged product, while the reddish sausage appears unwrapped. Both sausages have a smooth, slightly shiny surface, typical of processed meat products. The ends of the sausages are rounded, and the overall shape is cylindrical. There are no visible grill marks, toppings, or garnishes on either sausage. The sausages are placed directly on a flat, white surface, with no additional packaging or container visible.
description: Two smooth, cylindrical sausages—one reddish-brown and one beige with a blue and white label—are placed side by side on a flat white surface.
description_view_0: The sausages are seen from a side angle, showing the blue and white label on the beige sausage and the full length of both sausages.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the rounded ends of both sausages and the label's position on the beige sausage.
description_view_2: This angled view highlights the cylindrical shape and smooth surface of both sausages, with the label partially visible.
description_view_3: A close-up from the opposite side, showing the ends of the sausages and the label on the beige sausage more clearly.
attribute_brand_label: blue and white label with unreadable text
